testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_65] Ensure container insights are enabled on ECS cluster

[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it

[NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.app File: \modules\compute\main.tf: 201-207 Guideline: None
201 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "app" { 202 | name = "/ecs/${var.name_prefix}/${var.service_name}" 203 | retention_in_days = var.environment == "prod" ? 2555 : 90 204 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 205 | 206 | tags = var.tags 207 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.xray File: \modules\compute\main.tf: 209-215 Guideline: None
209 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "xray" { 210 | name = "/ecs/${var.name_prefix}/${var.service_name}/xray" 211 | retention_in_days = var.environment == "prod" ? 365 : 30 212 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 213 | 214 | tags = var.tags 215 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_150] Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.main File: \modules\compute\main.tf: 405-425 Guideline: None
405 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 406 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 407 | internal = false 408 | load_balancer_type = "application" 409 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 410 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 411 | 412 | # CKV_AWS_131: Drop invalid HTTP headers 413 | drop_invalid_header_fields = true 414 | 415 | # CKV_AWS_150: Deletion protection (always enabled in prod, optional elsewhere) 416 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" 417 | 418 | access_logs { 419 | bucket = var.alb_logs_bucket 420 | prefix = "alb/${var.name_prefix}" 421 | enabled = true 422 | } 423 | 424 | tags = merge(var.tags, { Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" }) 425 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_293] Ensure that AWS database instances have deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that AWS database instances have deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.main File: \modules\database\main.tf: 311-415 Guideline: None
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_76] Ensure AWS ALB attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability

failure.message: Ensure AWS ALB attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.main File: \modules\compute\main.tf: 405-425 Guideline: None
405 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 406 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 407 | internal = false 408 | load_balancer_type = "application" 409 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 410 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 411 | 412 | # CKV_AWS_131: Drop invalid HTTP headers 413 | drop_invalid_header_fields = true 414 | 415 | # CKV_AWS_150: Deletion protection (always enabled in prod, optional elsewhere) 416 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" 417 | 418 | access_logs { 419 | bucket = var.alb_logs_bucket 420 | prefix = "alb/${var.name_prefix}" 421 | enabled = true 422 | } 423 | 424 | tags = merge(var.tags, { Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" }) 425 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_60] Ensure RDS instance with copy tags to snapshots is enabled

failure.message: Ensure RDS instance with copy tags to snapshots is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.main File: \modules\database\main.tf: 311-415 Guideline: None
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.alb File: \modules\network\main.tf: 268-300 Guideline: None
268 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb" { 269 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb-sg" 270 | description = "Security Group para ALB de Brainmart. Solo HTTPS desde internet." 271 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 272 | 273 | # ENTRADA: solo HTTPS (443) desde cualquier IP 274 | # HTTP (80) no esta? permitido: redirigir a HTTPS debe ser manejado por el ALB listener 275 | ingress { 276 | description = "HTTPS desde internet" 277 | from_port = 443 278 | to_port = 443 279 | protocol = "tcp" 280 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 281 | } 282 | 283 | # SALIDA: hacia los microservicios en subnets privadas 284 | # Solo al puerto de la aplicacio?n .NET (8080) 285 | egress { 286 | description = "Hacia microservicios ECS en subnets privadas" 287 | from_port = 8080 288 | to_port = 8080 289 | protocol = "tcp" 290 | cidr_blocks = var.private_subnet_cidrs 291 | } 292 | 293 | tags = merge(var.tags, { 294 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb-sg" 295 | }) 296 | 297 | lifecycle { 298 | create_before_destroy = true 299 | } 300 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.ecs File: \modules\network\main.tf: 303-341 Guideline: None
303 | resource "aws_security_group" "ecs" { 304 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-ecs-sg" 305 | description = "Security Group para tareas ECS Fargate de Brainmart" 306 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 307 | 308 | # ENTRADA: solo desde el ALB en el puerto de la aplicacio?n 309 | ingress { 310 | description = "Desde ALB hacia la aplicacio?n .NET" 311 | from_port = 8080 312 | to_port = 8080 313 | protocol = "tcp" 314 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] # Solo desde el SG del ALB 315 | } 316 | 317 | # SALIDA: hacia RDS (PostgreSQL), Secrets Manager (via VPC Endpoint), S3 y ECR 318 | egress { 319 | description = "Hacia RDS PostgreSQL en subnets aisladas" 320 | from_port = 5432 321 | to_port = 5432 322 | protocol = "tcp" 323 | cidr_blocks = var.isolated_subnet_cidrs 324 | } 325 | 326 | egress { 327 | description = "HTTPS hacia VPC Endpoints y NAT (ECR, Secrets Manager, etc.)" 328 | from_port = 443 329 | to_port = 443 330 | protocol = "tcp" 331 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] # Necesario para NAT ? internet (ECR, actualizaciones) 332 | } 333 | 334 | tags = merge(var.tags, { 335 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-ecs-sg" 336 | }) 337 | 338 | lifecycle { 339 | create_before_destroy = true 340 | } 341 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.rds File: \modules\network\main.tf: 344-375 Guideline: None
344 | resource "aws_security_group" "rds" { 345 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-rds-sg" 346 | description = "Security Group para RDS PostgreSQL de Brainmart. Solo desde ECS." 347 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 348 | 349 | # ENTRADA: solo desde los microservicios ECS en el puerto PostgreSQL 350 | # CRI?TICO: 0.0.0.0/0 en el puerto 5432 esta? prohibido por SCP de Capa 0 351 | ingress { 352 | description = "PostgreSQL desde microservicios ECS" 353 | from_port = 5432 354 | to_port = 5432 355 | protocol = "tcp" 356 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.ecs.id] # Solo desde el SG de ECS 357 | } 358 | 359 | # SALIDA: ninguna (la BD solo responde a conexiones entrantes) 360 | egress { 361 | description = "Sin salida desde RDS" 362 | from_port = 0 363 | to_port = 0 364 | protocol = "-1" 365 | cidr_blocks = ["127.0.0.1/32"] # Solo loopback = efectivamente sin salida 366 | } 367 | 368 | tags = merge(var.tags, { 369 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-rds-sg" 370 | }) 371 | 372 | lifecycle { 373 | create_before_destroy = true 374 | } 375 | }
